posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 11 of 11 Pending | Tied for 1st with 41 others Romo vs. CalderonCarlos Calderon, SUB, R2Calderon is really bad but he’s fun to watch. He reminds me a lot of Ricky Turcios but better. His striking is terrible but he can keep a high pace and gets in your face creating chaos. His tdd and grapplin is pretty bad but he is a weasel. Ver hard to hold down, has an annoying guard game, signature guillotine, and is just very annoying overall. Romo is a lot better than his record shows but Calderon should be too craftyMoran vs. EcheverriaRoybert Echeverria, DECThis is a really weird one. Probably a dwcs elim but both these guys are pretty bad. I want to say Moran is the more talented guy, but he is not who he used to be. Coria completely ended him, since that KO Moran has been extremely passive. He lost a decision to journeyman Jacob Silva, and was struggling hard with a jobber last fight before getting the KO. He is a huge flyw and a good striker but I think he’s on a downturn sadly. Echeverria is a fraud though, he’s looks very flashy but there’s no substance behind his game. He’s also very chinny and can’t wrestle either. I guess he wins but I wouldn’t be shocked if Moran pulls this off. Winner to dwcs, will be a great fadeJúnior vs. GoleyElias Goley, TKO, R1Goldy got a crazy upset ko last fight over a Kill Cliff prospect. Idk how good he is but he looks extremely powerful. Junior has a bjj background from what I can tell, but this seems like a really tough debut. Not o ly is he facing a striker but Goley is much more experiencedBorrego vs. PuenteDavid Puente, TKO, R2Puente looks bad and is significantly less experienced but I can’t pic Borrego against anyone. He is truely a jobber who is good at nothing
